parameters.query: SELECT * FROM consm_barcodeinfo WHERE uuid IN ({{ $json.snList }});

WITH RecentMachineData AS (
    SELECT
        md.machine_data_id,
        md.retroid_id,
        md.procedure_detail_id,
        md.data,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY md.retroid_id ORDER BY md.createtime DESC) as rn
    FROM
        mes.machine_data md
    WHERE
        md.procedure_detail_id = '79'
)

SELECT DISTINCT
    j.joborder_number,
    r.retroid
FROM
    mes.retroid r
JOIN
    RecentMachineData rmd ON r.retroid_id = rmd.retroid_id AND rmd.rn = 1
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON 
    -- 修改部分开始：优先取 jobNumber，没有则取 ticketNo
    COALESCE(rmd.data->>'jobNumber', rmd.data->>'ticketNo') = j.joborder_number
    -- 修改部分结束
WHERE
    r.retroid IN ({{ $json.snList }})
  and
    j.status = '1'
 and 
    r.status in('1','2');

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM consm_barcodeinfo WHERE uuid in ({{ $json.sn_list }});

WITH RecentMachineData AS (
    SELECT
        md.machine_data_id,
        md.retroid_id,
        md.procedure_detail_id,
        md.data,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY md.retroid_id ORDER BY md.createtime DESC) as rn
    FROM
        mes.machine_data md
    WHERE
        md.procedure_detail_id = '81'
)

SELECT DISTINCT
    j.joborder_number,
    r.retroid
FROM
    mes.retroid r
JOIN
    RecentMachineData rmd ON r.retroid_id = rmd.retroid_id AND rmd.rn = 1
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON 
    -- 修改部分开始：优先取 jobNumber，没有则取 ticketNo
    COALESCE(rmd.data->>'jobNumber', rmd.data->>'ticketNo') = j.joborder_number
    -- 修改部分结束
WHERE
    r.retroid IN ({{ $json.sn_list }})
  and
    j.status = '1'
 and 
    r.status in('1','2');

parameters.query:
WITH RecentMachineData AS (
    SELECT
        md.machine_data_id,
        md.retroid_id,
        md.procedure_detail_id,
        md.data,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY md.retroid_id ORDER BY md.createtime DESC) as rn
    FROM
        mes.machine_data md
    WHERE
        md.procedure_detail_id = '79'
)

SELECT DISTINCT
    j.joborder_number,
    r.retroid,
    pi.product_code
FROM
    mes.retroid r
JOIN
    RecentMachineData rmd ON r.retroid_id = rmd.retroid_id AND rmd.rn = 1
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON rmd.data->>'jobNumber' = j.joborder_number 
  
JOIN mes.product_info pi on pi.product_id=j.product_id
WHERE
    r.retroid IN ({{ $json.snList }})
  and
  j.joborder_type='PACK'
  and
    j.status = '1'
 and 
    r.status in('1','2');

nodes.name: 根据SN查询工单信息(越南mes)

parameters.query:
WITH RecentMachineData AS (
    SELECT
        md.machine_data_id,
        md.retroid_id,
        md.procedure_detail_id,
        md.data,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY md.retroid_id ORDER BY md.createtime DESC) as rn
    FROM
        mes.machine_data md
    WHERE
        md.procedure_detail_id = '79'
)

SELECT DISTINCT
    j.joborder_number,
    r.retroid,
  pi.product_code
FROM
    mes.retroid r
JOIN
    RecentMachineData rmd ON r.retroid_id = rmd.retroid_id AND rmd.rn = 1
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON rmd.data->>'jobNumber' = j.joborder_number
  JOIN mes.product_info pi on pi.product_id=j.product_id
WHERE
    r.retroid in ({{ $json.sn_list }})
  and
    j.status = '1'
 and 
    r.status in('1','2');
